attributes.content:
## Overview

The Podcast Episode card gives the workspace a structured home for audio episode with transcript, show notes, guest info, timestamps, and chapters.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Podcast Episode usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[AI Image]]** -- Podcast Episode can incorporate generated visuals or treat image output as a linked asset.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Podcast Episode into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Podcast Episode can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Podcast Episode often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Document]]** -- Podcast Episode can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Brand Guide]]** -- Brand Guide can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Podcast Episode.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Podcast Episode as the structured home for audio episode with transcript, show notes, guest info, timestamps, and chapters and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Podcast Episode when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Podcast Episode stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Podcast Episode
cardInfo.summary: Audio episode with transcript, show notes, guest info, timestamps, and chapters.
